title: WebGPU Reaches W3C Recommendation
desc: The WebGPU API for high-performance graphics and compute in browsers is now a W3C Recommendation, signaling broad browser support.

title: View Transitions API Goes Mainstream
desc: Native page transition animations without JavaScript libraries. Now supported in Chrome, with Safari and Firefox following.

title: CSS Container Queries Ship Everywhere
desc: Component-level responsive design without media queries. Elements respond to their container's size, not the viewport.

title: 2026 Web Development Trends
desc: Explore trending web dev topics on GitHub - from React server components to edge computing and AI integration patterns.

title: State of JavaScript 2026 Results
desc: Annual survey results showing emerging frameworks, tools, and techniques that developers are adopting in 2026.
